tasks.name: footer-lorem-ipsum
tasks.summary: Added footer component to app/layout.js with lorem ipsum placeholder text. Footer appears on all pages with dark mode support and consistent styling matching the existing design system.

tasks.name: home-page-menu
tasks.summary: Added responsive navigation menu with hamburger toggle for mobile, horizontal menu for desktop, dark mode support, and links to Home, Products, Learn More, and Contact. Store logo is now clickable home link.

tasks.name: product-page-improvements
tasks.summary: Updated product page button colors: changed 'Add to Cart' button from indigo to orange to match site theme, and changed heart/wishlist icon hover color to red. Changes work in both light and dark modes.
